description: Architecture Decision Records: persist every significant technical choice — approach picks, schema shapes, dependency adoptions — to taskmaster-docs/adr/ with context, rejected options, consequences, and a revisit-when trigger. Status lifecycle proposed/accepted/superseded. Includes /decision-records:new.
